revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:姉崎]][[zh:姉崎]]
'''Anesaki''' ({{ill|Anesaki|ja|姉崎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anesaki|1=Anesaki district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q27500978}}) == Place Names == * {{ill|Anesaki District|ja|姉崎地区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anesaki District|1=Anesaki area|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q118869038}} - A district within the jurisdiction of {{ill|Anesaki Branch Office, Ichihara City Hall|ja|市原市役所姉崎支所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anesaki Branch Office, Ichihara City Hall|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 市原市役所|1=Ichihara City Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q30923341}}, {{ill|Ichihara, Chiba|en|Ichihara, Chiba|qid=Q207881|lt=Ichihara, Chiba|1=Ichihara, Chiba}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}. Sometimes includes the {{ill|Yūshū District|ja|有秋地区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yūshū District|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 姉崎地区|1=Anesaki area|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q118869038}}, under the jurisdiction of {{ill|Yūshū Branch Office, Ichihara City Hall|ja|市原市役所有秋支所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yūshū Branch Office, Ichihara City Hall|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 市原市役所|1=Ichihara City Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q30923341}}. (Japanese: あねさきちく) ** {{ill|Anesaki, Ichihara|ja|姉崎 (市原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anesaki, Ichihara|1=Anesaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q28686258}} - A locality in {{ill|Ichihara, Chiba|en|Ichihara, Chiba|qid=Q207881|lt=Ichihara, Chiba|1=Ichihara, Chiba}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}. (Japanese: あねさき) ** {{ill|Anesaki Town|ja|姉崎町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anesaki Town|1=Anesaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11447265}} - A former municipality encompassing the current {{ill|Anesaki District|ja|姉崎地区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anesaki District|1=Anesaki area|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q118869038}} and {{ill|Yūshū District|ja|有秋地区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yūshū District|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 姉崎地区|1=Anesaki area|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q118869038}} that existed until April 30, 1963. (Japanese: あねさきまち) == Japanese Surnames == * A Japanese surname. {{ill|Geographic Disambiguation|ja|地名の曖昧さ回避|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geographic Disambiguation|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{translated page|ja|姉崎|version=97815253|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:姉崎]]
